framework: magento
version: "2.x"
last_updated: "2026-04-28"

status: official
---

# Magento 2.x — Tech Pack

## 1. Fingerprinting Signals

| Signal | Type | Value | Confidence |
|--------|------|-------|------------|
| `X-Magento-Tags` response header | HTTP header | any value | High (origin-direct); usually stripped by Varnish in production |
| `X-Magento-Cache-Id` response header | HTTP header | any value (introduced in 2.4.4) | High (origin-direct); usually stripped by Varnish in production |
| `X-Magento-Cache-Debug` response header | HTTP header | `HIT` or `MISS` (only in developer mode) | Definitive — confirms Varnish+Magento stack |
| `X-Magento-Vary` cookie | Cookie | any value | High |
| `mage-cache-sessid` cookie | Cookie | exact name | High |
| `mage-cache-storage` localStorage key | JS storage | exact name | High |
| `mage-cache-storage-section-invalidation` cookie | Cookie | exact name | High |
| `mage-messages` cookie | Cookie | exact name | Medium |
| `mage-translation-file-version` cookie | Cookie | exact name | Medium |
| `form_key` hidden field in HTML | HTML substring | `name="form_key"` | High |
| `/pub/static/` in script/link paths | HTML substring | `/pub/static/` | High |
| `/static/version{hash}/frontend/` in paths | HTML substring | `/static/version` | High |
| `require.js` / RequireJS loaded | HTML script | `require.js` or `requirejs` | Medium |
| `window.require` JS global with Magento config | JS global | `window.require` | High |
| `data-mage-init` attributes in HTML | HTML attribute | `data-mage-init` | High |
| `Mage_` prefixed JS component names | JS inline | `Mage_` | High |
| `Mage.Cookies` in inline JS | JS inline | `Mage.Cookies` | High |
| Wappalyzer result | MCP | `"Magento"` | Definitive |
| `GET /magento_version` returns JSON | HTTP endpoint | `{"version":"2.x","edition":"Community"}` | Version (minor only; blocked on hardened installs) |

**Important:** `X-Magento-Tags` and `X-Magento-Cache-Id` are the Magento-to-Varnish cache-tag channel. On the typical production stack where Varnish sits in front, these headers are consumed and stripped by Varnish's VCL before the response reaches the client. They are reliable fingerprints only when probing origin directly (bypassing Varnish). Use cookie and HTML signals as primary client-side indicators.

**Version extraction:**
```bash
curl -s {site}/magento_version
# Returns: {"version":"2.4","edition":"Community"}
# NOTE: returns minor version only (e.g. "2.4"), NOT patch level ("2.4.7-p3")
# This endpoint may be blocked (404/403) on security-hardened stores.

# Also check meta generator or inline JS:
curl -s {site} | grep -oP 'Magento/\K[0-9.]+'

# Check static path for version hint:
curl -s {site} | grep -oP '/static/version\K[^/]+'
```

## 2. Default API Surfaces

**Authentication reality (verified against core webapi.xml):** Only endpoints explicitly configured with `<resource ref="anonymous"/>` in Magento's core `webapi.xml` files are truly public. Many endpoints commonly assumed to be public actually require admin ACL tokens. The table below reflects the authoritative source-code state.

| Endpoint | Method | Auth | Notes |
|----------|--------|------|-------|
| `/rest/V1/directory/countries` | GET | None | Full country list with ISO codes and regions — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/directory/countries/:countryId` | GET | None | Single country with regions — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/directory/currency` | GET | None | Base and allowed currencies — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/search` | GET | None | Elasticsearch/OpenSearch-backed search — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/products-render-info` | GET | None | Product render data for frontend display — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts` | POST | None | Create guest cart; returns cartId UUID — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/:cartId` | GET | None | Retrieve guest cart — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/:cartId/items` | GET/POST | None | Guest cart item operations — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/:cartId/totals` | GET | None | Guest cart totals with tax breakdown — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/:cartId/payment-methods` | GET | None | Available payment methods — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/:cartId/shipping-methods` | GET | None | Available shipping methods — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/integration/admin/token` | POST | Credentials in body | Generate admin Bearer token — endpoint itself is anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/integration/customer/token` | POST | Credentials in body | Generate customer Bearer token — endpoint itself is anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/customers/isEmailAvailable` | POST | None | Check if email is registered — confirmed anonymous |
| `/rest/V1/store/storeViews` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Requires `Magento_Backend::store` — NOT public by default |
| `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Requires `Magento_Backend::store` — NOT public by default |
| `/rest/V1/categories` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Requires `Magento_Catalog::categories` — NOT public by default |
| `/rest/V1/products` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Requires `Magento_Catalog::products` — NOT public by default |
| `/rest/V1/cmsPage/search` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Requires `Magento_Cms::page` — NOT public by default |
| `/rest/V1/cmsBlock/search` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Requires `Magento_Cms::block` — NOT public by default |
| `/graphql` | POST | None* | GraphQL endpoint (Magento 2.3+); *auth required only for customer-specific data |
| `/rest/all/V1/store/storeViews` | GET | **Admin ACL** | Same ACL requirement as above but using `all` store scope |

> **Note:** Store owners can open additional endpoints to anonymous access by installing third-party modules or custom `webapi.xml` overrides. The "Admin ACL" entries above reflect core Magento defaults — individual deployments may differ.

## 3. Config / Constants Locations

| Location | What's there | How to access |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| `window.BASE_URL` | Site base URL | JS eval in browser |
| `window.FORM_KEY` | CSRF form key for the session | JS eval in browser |
| `window.require.s.contexts._` | RequireJS config: module paths, base URL, bundles | JS eval in browser |
| `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` | Locale, currency, timezone, theme, base_url per store | Requires admin ACL token |
| `app/etc/env.php` | DB credentials, cache backend, crypt key | Source/server only |
| `app/etc/config.php` | Enabled modules list, scopes | Source/server only |
| `pub/static/.../requirejs-bundle-config.json` | RequireJS bundle manifest | Public GET (path varies by theme) |
| Inline `<script>` with `window.checkoutConfig` | Checkout payment methods, quote data | HTML scrape on checkout page |
| `data-mage-init` JSON attributes | Per-component JS config | HTML scrape |
| GraphQL `{ storeConfig { ... } }` query | Locale, currency, base URL, store code — same as REST storeConfigs | Public POST to `/graphql` |

> **Correction from original:** `window.BASE_URL` and the GraphQL `storeConfig` query are reliable public sources for store configuration. The REST `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` endpoint is not public by default and requires an admin token.

## 4. Auth Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---------|----------|-------|
| Bearer token (admin) | `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header | Obtained via POST to `/rest/V1/integration/admin/token`; expires 4h by default (`oauth/access_token_lifetime/admin` config) |
| Bearer token (customer) | `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header | Obtained via POST to `/rest/V1/integration/customer/token`; longer TTL |
| Guest cart token | UUID in URL path | Returned from POST `/rest/V1/guest-carts`; used as `{cartId}` in cart endpoints |
| OAuth 1.0a | OAuth signature headers | For registered integrations; configured in Admin > System > Integrations |
| Form key (CSRF) | `form_key` POST param or `X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest` | Required for all web form POST and AJAX calls |
| Cookie session | `PHPSESSID` + `frontend` cookie | Browser session; not usable for REST API directly |

**Admin token acquisition:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST {site}/rest/V1/integration/admin/token \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"your-password"}'
# Returns: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
# NOTE: Magento 2.4+ enforces 2FA for admin accounts by default.
# Token endpoint returns 400 with 2FA error unless bypassed via integration token.
```

**Customer token acquisition:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST {site}/rest/V1/integration/customer/token \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"customer@example.com","password":"password"}'
# Returns: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
```

**GraphQL with store header:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST {site}/graphql \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Store: default" \
  -d '{"query":"{ storeConfig { store_code base_url locale } }"}'
# Store header is optional for single-store; required for multi-store scoping.
# Without it, Magento uses the configured default store.
```

## 5. JS Bundle Patterns

| Path | Content |
|------|---------|
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/js/bundle/bundle.js` | Main compiled JS bundle (Magento 2.4+) |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/requirejs-bundle-config.json` | RequireJS bundle manifest — lists all bundles and their modules |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/mage/bootstrap.js` | Magento bootstrap / RequireJS init |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/Magento_Ui/js/lib/ko/initialize.js` | KnockoutJS initialization |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/adminhtml/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/` | Admin panel static assets (separate path) |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/Magento_Checkout/js/view/` | Checkout UI component JS |

Check each bundle URL + `.map` suffix for source maps. The `version{N}` segment is a deployment stamp that increments on `bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy`.

## 6. Source Map Patterns

Magento 2 core JS files do NOT include source maps in production deployments.
Custom themes compiled via Grunt/webpack/Vite MAY include source maps.

Check strategy:
- Fetch `requirejs-bundle-config.json` to enumerate all bundle file paths.
- For each bundle, try appending `.map` — a `200` response means source maps are exposed.
- Theme JS at `/pub/static/.../js/*.js` — check `//# sourceMappingURL=` comment at end of file.
- Admin panel bundles at `/pub/static/.../adminhtml/` follow the same pattern.

If source maps are present, they will expose original TypeScript/ES6 source paths, component names, and internal module structure.

## 7. Common Modules & Extensions

| Module / Extension | API it adds | Detection signal |
|--------------------|------------|-----------------|
| `Magento_Catalog` | `/rest/V1/products`, `/rest/V1/categories` (admin ACL) | Core; always present |
| `Magento_Checkout` | `/rest/V1/guest-carts`, `/rest/V1/carts` | Core; `checkout` in URL or cookie |
| `Magento_Customer` | `/rest/V1/customers`, `/rest/V1/integration/customer/token` | Core; `customer` in HTML |
| `Magento_Search` | `/rest/V1/search?searchCriteria[...]` (public) | Core; Elasticsearch/OpenSearch backend |
| `Magento_Swatches` | Swatch data in product REST/GraphQL response | `swatch_data` key in product JSON |
| `Magento_LayeredNavigation` | Aggregation filters in `/rest/V1/search` response | `aggregations` key in search response |
| `Magento_Inventory` (MSI) | `/rest/V1/inventory/source-items`, stock data | Magento 2.3+ (Open Source and Commerce); `Magento_Inventory` in module list |
| `PageBuilder` (Adobe Commerce) | `/rest/V1/pagebuilder/` prefix; structured content JSON | `data-content-type` attributes in CMS HTML |
| `Magento_B2b` (Adobe Commerce) | `/rest/V1/company`, `/rest/V1/requisition-lists` | Enterprise only; `company` in GraphQL schema |
| Amasty extensions | Varies by module (e.g., `/rest/V1/amasty_*`) | `Amasty_` namespace in HTML JS includes |
| Mirasvit extensions | Varies (e.g., search, SEO modules) | `Mirasvit_` namespace in HTML JS includes |
| Aheadworks extensions | Varies (e.g., `/rest/V1/aw_*`) | `Aheadworks_` namespace in HTML JS includes |
| `Magento_Wishlist` | `/rest/V1/wishlists/...` (requires customer token — not a public probe signal) | `wishlist` in page HTML or JS component names |
| `Magento_GiftCard` (Adobe Commerce) | `/rest/V1/gift-cards/` | `giftcard` in HTML or checkout config |

## 8. Known Public Data

| Endpoint / Source | Data | Notes |
|----------|------|-------|
| `/rest/V1/directory/countries` | Full country list with ISO codes and regions | Truly anonymous; useful for locale/region mapping |
| `/rest/V1/directory/currency` | Base currency code and allowed currencies | Truly anonymous; reveals target markets |
| `/rest/V1/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1` | One search result with full product schema | Truly anonymous; reveals custom attributes |
| `/rest/V1/products-render-info?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1&storeId=1&currencyCode=USD` | Product render data (name, price, images, URLs) | Truly anonymous — useful alternative to `/rest/V1/products` |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts` (POST) | Returns guest cartId UUID | Truly anonymous; confirms checkout is functional |
| `/graphql` with `{ storeConfig { ... } }` | Store configuration: store_code, base_url, locale, currency, timezone | Public GraphQL query — key data source since `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` requires admin ACL |
| `/graphql` with `{ categories(filters: {}) { items { id name url_key } } }` | Category tree | Public GraphQL query |
| `/graphql` with `{ products(search: "a") { items { name sku } } }` | Product catalog sample | Public GraphQL query |
| `/graphql` with introspection | Full GraphQL schema | Often disabled in production (`allow_graphql_introspection` config) |
| `/magento_version` | Version string (minor only) and edition | Minor version fingerprint; may be blocked |
| `/sitemap.xml` | Sitemap index or product/category URLs | Enumeration of content |
| `window.BASE_URL` (page JS) | Site base URL | Extracted from any storefront page JS |
| `window.checkoutConfig` (checkout page JS) | Payment methods, active quote data, store info | HTML scrape of checkout page |

> **Important correction from original:** `/rest/V1/store/storeViews`, `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs`, `/rest/V1/categories`, `/rest/V1/cmsPage/search`, and `/rest/V1/cmsBlock/search` are **not public by default**. They require admin ACL tokens. Use the GraphQL `storeConfig` and `categories` queries as the public alternatives.

## 9. Probe Checklist

Run these in order. Record result (200 / 401 / 403 / 404) for each.

- [ ] `HEAD /rest/V1/directory/countries` — confirm REST API is accessible and get response headers; check for `X-Varnish`, `Age`, `X-Magento-Cache-Debug`
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/directory/countries` — country list; confirm public API is open (truly anonymous)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/directory/currency` — currency data (truly anonymous)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1` — anonymous product search; note schema for custom attributes
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/products-render-info?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1&storeId=1&currencyCode=USD` — anonymous product render data
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/store/storeViews` — expect 401 on default config (requires admin ACL); note if 200 (admin creds in session or misconfigured)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` — expect 401 on default config; use GraphQL storeConfig instead
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/categories` — expect 401 on default config; use GraphQL categories query instead
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/products?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1` — expect 401 (requires admin ACL)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/cmsPage/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=10` — expect 401 on default config
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ storeConfig { store_code base_url locale base_currency_code } }"}` — primary public store config source
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ categories(filters: {}) { items { id name url_key } } }"}` — public category tree
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ products(search: \"a\", pageSize: 1) { items { name sku } } }"}` — public product sample
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ __schema { types { name } } }"}` — introspection check (often returns 200 but with disabled error)
- [ ] `GET /magento_version` — attempt version and edition detection (minor version only; may be 404/403)
- [ ] Check response headers: `X-Varnish` (Varnish present), `Age` (cache age in seconds), `X-Magento-Cache-Debug: HIT|MISS` (developer mode only)
- [ ] `GET /pub/static/` path from HTML — extract `version{N}` segment; check `requirejs-bundle-config.json`
- [ ] Inspect `window.require.s.contexts._` in browser JS — extract module map and base URL
- [ ] Inspect page HTML for `data-mage-init` attributes — reveals active JS components
- [ ] Check for `Amasty_`, `Mirasvit_`, `Aheadworks_` in HTML source — third-party extension detection
- [ ] `POST /rest/V1/integration/customer/token` with test credentials — verify auth endpoint shape (expect 400/401 with bad creds, not 404)
- [ ] `POST /rest/V1/guest-carts` — confirm checkout is live and get a guest cartId
- [ ] `GET /rest/all/V1/store/storeViews` — check if `all` scope returns 200 or 401 (same ACL as scoped version)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/inventory/source-items` — MSI (Multi-Source Inventory) endpoints
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/company` — B2B module endpoints (if Adobe Commerce)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/requisition-lists` — B2B requisition list endpoints
- [ ] Check for Adobe Commerce features — PageBuilder, GiftCard, RewardPoints endpoints
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/store/storeViews` — enumerate all store views (multi-store setups)
- [ ] `GET /pub/static/version{N}/` — extract version number from paths, check for outdated versions

## 10. Gotchas

- **Store code in REST path.** The REST API base path can include a store code: `/rest/{store_code}/V1/`. Use `/rest/V1/` for the default store or `/rest/all/V1/` for cross-store admin scope. Store codes are arbitrary admin-set strings (e.g., `default`, `en`, `us`) — they are NOT necessarily locale codes despite locale-like naming conventions seen on some stores.
- **Most catalog endpoints require auth.** Contrary to common documentation, `/rest/V1/products`, `/rest/V1/categories`, `/rest/V1/store/storeViews`, `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs`, `/rest/V1/cmsPage/search`, and `/rest/V1/cmsBlock/search` all require admin ACL tokens in core Magento. Use `/rest/V1/search` (anonymous) or GraphQL queries as public alternatives for catalog and store data.
- **`/rest/V1/products-render-info` is the hidden public product endpoint.** This endpoint is genuinely anonymous and returns product render data including names, prices, images, and URLs. It is not widely documented but useful when `/rest/V1/products` returns 401.
- **Static file versioning.** All static assets are under `/pub/static/version{N}/` where `{N}` is a deployment timestamp. This version number changes on every `bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy` run. Hardcoded paths will break after redeploy.
- **GraphQL introspection is often disabled.** Production stores frequently disable `__schema` introspection via the `allow_graphql_introspection` config. Try individual queries (`storeConfig`, `categories`, `products`) directly even if introspection fails.
- **Store header in GraphQL is optional, not required.** If omitted, Magento uses the configured default store. Include `Store: {store_code}` when probing a specific store view in a multi-store setup. Without it, responses reflect the default store only.
- **`X-Magento-Tags` is stripped by Varnish.** This header is the app-to-Varnish cache invalidation channel, consumed by Varnish's VCL. It is rarely visible to external HTTP clients in production. Rely on cookie and HTML signals for fingerprinting, not this header.
- **`X-Magento-Cache-Debug` only appears in developer mode.** The `HIT`/`MISS` debug header is injected by Varnish's VCL only when Magento is in developer mode. In production mode, these debug headers are suppressed. Look for `X-Varnish` (Varnish request ID) and `Age` (seconds cached) as production-mode Varnish indicators.
- **`/magento_version` returns minor version only.** The endpoint returns the minor version (e.g., `2.4`) not the patch release (`2.4.7-p3`). It can be blocked (404/403) on security-hardened stores by disabling the `Magento_Version` module. A missing response does not mean the site is not Magento.
- **form_key is required for AJAX.** All POST AJAX calls to Magento frontend controllers require the `form_key` CSRF token, typically passed as a POST parameter or in `X-Requested-With` + `form_key` body field. Without it, requests return redirect to cart or empty response.
- **Admin tokens expire.** Admin REST tokens expire after 4 hours by default (`oauth/access_token_lifetime/admin` config). Customer tokens have a separate, often longer TTL. Always handle 401 responses by re-acquiring the token.
- **Multi-store scoping returns different data.** The same endpoint path under different store codes returns store-scoped prices, content, and currency. Use the GraphQL `storeConfig` query (public) to enumerate store details, then probe critical endpoints under each store code.
- **Adobe Commerce (Enterprise) has extra APIs.** B2B modules add `/rest/V1/company`, `/rest/V1/negotiable-quote`, `/rest/V1/requisition-lists`. PageBuilder adds structured content JSON in CMS data. Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service (ACCS), launched 2025, is a multi-tenant SaaS variant with the same API surface. These are NOT present in Magento Open Source.
- **RequireJS, not ESM.** Magento 2 uses RequireJS (AMD modules) throughout. Do not expect `import`/`export` syntax in JS bundles. Module names map to file paths via the RequireJS config at `window.require.s.contexts._`.
- **Elasticsearch/OpenSearch is the search backend.** The `/rest/V1/search` endpoint proxies to Elasticsearch/OpenSearch. Query syntax uses `searchCriteria[filterGroups][0][filters][0][field]=name&searchCriteria[filterGroups][0][filters][0][value]=...`. Malformed criteria silently return empty results.
- **Two-factor authentication (2FA) affects admin API.** Magento 2.4+ enables 2FA for admin accounts by default. Admin REST token generation via `/rest/V1/integration/admin/token` returns a 400 error with a 2FA message unless 2FA is disabled or a pre-configured integration (OAuth) token is used instead.
- **Magento 2.4.8 adds GraphQL Subscriptions.** Version 2.4.8 (2025) introduces real-time GraphQL Subscriptions, directive customization (`@include`/`@skip`), and depth/complexity analysis to prevent abuse. If probing a modern store, the GraphQL schema will include subscription types.

## 12. Framework-Specific Google Dorks

Use these Google search queries to discover exposed endpoints, configuration files, and documentation for this framework.

### Discovery Queries

| Search Query | What it finds |
|--------------|---------------|
| `site:{domain} inurl:/rest/V1/` | Magento REST API v1 endpoints |
| `site:{domain} inurl:/pub/static/version` | Magento static asset version paths |
| `site:{domain} inurl:/admin/` | Magento admin panel paths |

### Complete Dork List for Magento

```
# API endpoints
site:{domain} inurl:/rest/V1/
site:{domain} inurl:/graphql
site:{domain} inurl:/rest/V1/products

# Framework-specific paths
site:{domain} inurl:/pub/static/version
site:{domain} inurl:/admin/

# Configuration files
site:{domain} filetype:xml "webapi.xml"
site:{domain} filetype:php "app/etc/env.php"

# Documentation/leaks
site:{domain} "Magento" "api" "endpoint"
site:{domain} "form_key" "magento"

# Admin/debug paths
site:{domain} inurl:/admin/
site:{domain} inurl:/magento_version
```

## 11. GitHub Code Search Patterns

Use these queries on GitHub to find custom endpoints, plugin code, and configuration examples for this framework.

### Framework-Specific Queries

| Search Query | What it finds |
|--------------|---------------|
| `"<route url=" language:xml path:etc/` | Magento 2 route definitions in XML config |
| `"V1_" language:php` | REST API V1 endpoint implementations |
| `"interface=" language:xml` | Interface definitions in XML config |

### Example Queries for Magento

```bash
# Search for custom API routes/endpoints
site:github.com "Magento" "api" filetype:xml "route url"

# Search for authentication patterns
site:github.com "Magento" "auth" "V1_" language:php

# Search for configuration files with endpoint definitions
site:github.com "Magento" "etc" "endpoint" language:xml

# Search for custom post types, taxonomies, or extensions
site:github.com "Magento" "module" "custom" language:php
```
